meta.sourcePolicy: Official HPA/JPA sources only. This file records 2022 event-level source candidates and must not auto-promote athlete histories into data/database.json.
notes: Temporary 2022 official-source candidate addendum for HPA Event Watch.
Keep separate from athlete master data, confirmed athlete histories, and research candidates.
The linked annual HPA result PDF is an event-level source locator; individual athlete rows require separate identity and row verification before promotion.

events.name: 2022春の北海道パワーリフティング大会
includedChampionships: 全日本高校パワーリフティング選手権大会 第6回北海道予選会

sources.title: 2022年北海道協会大会結果PDF
sources.evidenceLines: HPA top page year navigation links 2022 to 2022resulttt.pdf. PDF pages for the spring meet state 全日本高校パワーリフティング選手権大会 第6回北海道予選会 and 国民体育大会パワーリフティング公開競技 第8回北海道代表選考会, with 2022年5月14日-15日 and 会場 江別総合体育館 柔剣道場.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.
Do not promote athlete rows into confirmed histories without matching athlete identity, category/class, event date, and PDF row.
Record marks in the PDF require separate北海道記録/JPA verification before summarizing as record-holder achievements.
